blockingIssues.description: Skills are stored in `.skills` directory but AGENTS.md specifies user-extensible skills should be in `.swell/skills/`. The ExtractionConfig defaults store_path to `.skills` which does not match the documented skill discovery path. Extracted skills will not be discoverable by the system's skill discovery mechanism.

TrajectoryAnalyzer has #[allow(dead_code)] and its store field is never used for database lookups. The analyzer appears designed to query historical trajectory data but currently only processes input in memory.
Line 955: Confidence calculation uses sum of all pattern frequencies (`frequency_map.values().sum()`) as denominator instead of per-pattern frequency. NOT FIXED from round 1.

Line 1145: Convention parsing uses wrong string slice index [3..] instead of [4..]. For input '- **name**: description', position 0='-', 1=' ', 2='*', 3='*', 4='n'. Name starts at index 4. NOT FIXED from round 1.
Line 1173: get_anti_patterns_for_error is an unimplemented stub returning empty vec with comment 'For MVP, return empty'. NOT FIXED from round 1.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the skill store path convention: skill extraction outputs to `.skills/` but AGENTS.md documents `.swell/skills/` as the user-extensible skill directory. Either (a) update skill_extraction.rs to use `.swell/skills/` as the default store path, or (b) update AGENTS.md to document both locations with different purposes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: memory-skill-extraction stores to `.skills/` (line 125) but AGENTS.md line ~210 states 'Users can add new skills to .swell/skills/ - no code changes needed. SWELL discovers skills at startup.'

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the skills directory structure more explicitly. The memory-skill-extraction feature extracts skills to `.skills/` but the existing skill discovery reads from `.swell/skills/`. There's a disconnect between skill extraction and skill discovery.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: memory-skill-extraction review found skills stored in `.skills/` but discovery mechanism expects `.swell/skills/`. Workers are confused about which location to use.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The memory-pattern-learning feature has three bugs that have persisted through multiple rounds: (1) confidence calculation uses wrong denominator, (2) convention parsing uses wrong string slice index, (3) anti-pattern retrieval is unimplemented stub. These need explicit fixes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All 3 issues marked 'NOT FIXED from round 1' in reviews. pattern_learning.rs lines 955, 1145, 1173 still contain the bugs.
